included in load_reader moduleincluded in load_reader module

Imports

load_buffer, reader_common

Types

LoadReader = object
  state*: ReadState
  load*: LoadState
Source   Edit   
LoadState = object
  buffer*: LoadBuffer
  bufferLocks*: int
Source   Edit   
TrackedLoadReader = object
  state*: TrackedReadState
  load*: LoadState
Source   Edit  

Procs

proc callLoader(reader: var LoadReader) {.inline, ...raises: [Exception],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
for internal use, only called if buffer loader is known not to be nil Source   Edit
